ogTitle: Cumberland Reach vs Cumbo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cumberland Reach and Cumbo.
heading: Cumberland Reach vs Cumbo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cumberland Reach, New South Wales and Cumbo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cumberland Reach has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Cumbo (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cumberland Reach or Cumbo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cumberland Reach has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Cumbo scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cumberland Reach scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Cumbo scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cumberland Reach or Cumbo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cumberland Reach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
